name: Plot Twist
short_description: Welcome to Plot Twist, where you take on the role of an ambitious writer in a world of stories and inspiration. You will manage your own writing career, create bestsellers, gain fans, and shape the history of literature! Your success depends on making the right decisions and your creativity!
detailed_description:
Plot Twist immerses you in the world of the literary industry, where you can rise from an unknown writer to a chart-topping phenomenon. It blends classic tycoon elements with original mini-games, helping you handle every creative and managerial “plot twist” along the way.

           

Start small, but as your success grows, establish a thriving literary studio. Hire editors, illustrators, and marketing specialists to help you reach new heights. Eventually, you can even become a publisher and decide what gets released—both your own works and other authors’ manuscripts.

          

Dare to experiment with various genres—try gripping sci-fi, moving romance, or a mysterious thriller. You can also create books in multiple formats (print, e-book, or audiobook) and expand your audience to capture the hearts of different reader groups.

          

While writing, you’ll enter the unique Focus Screen mode, where you choose what aspect of your work to emphasize—deep characters, thrilling twists, or captivating settings. Making the right calls opens up new possibilities and exciting add-ons for your final masterpiece.

         

Pick the right publisher or gradually become a publisher yourself. After each release, pay close attention to reviews—feedback from critics and fans will help you refine your work and transform good books into true literary masterpieces.

          

Plot Twist not only boosts your creativity but also offers entertaining mini-games to give you a break from constant writing. On top of that, you’ll face various narrative challenges and unexpected events during writing and promotion, bringing new opportunities or hurdles to overcome.

         

By consistently writing and releasing books, you’ll unlock new abilities—from captivating plot structuring to masterful prose and impactful marketing strategies. Keep evolving to stay ahead of the competition and secure your place among the literary elite.

         

Bring talented individuals into your studio—editors, illustrators, and marketing pros—to help elevate your work. Each team member has their strengths and weaknesses, and the right mix of experts can turn any manuscript into a true bestseller!

supported_languages: English, Czech, German, Portuguese - Brazil, Polish, Russian
